title: VidTDM's GUI
description: A GUI Pack inspired by MCC Island
body:
<center>
  
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mf3QmeLh/57fb7e64d19bf3eb2b821e76b76bf27dc966aa23_96.webp)

A resource pack I made insipired by MCC Island
## Supported Mods
</center>

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)

Please let me know for any other mods you want support for by creating an [issue](https://github.com/VidTDM/vidtdm-s-gui/issues) on Github.
